prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns, assuming ETN follows normal market behavior with moderate volatility. The point estimate reflects a slight upward bias common in equity markets over short periods. Confidence intervals are constructed assuming approximately 15-20% annualized volatility, scaled to 7 days. Without specific historical data or fundamental analysis, these intervals capture reasonable uncertainty around the current price level.
